Introduction
We applied lesion network mapping in a pediatric epilepsy cohort.

Methods
First, we manually segmented each lesion to produce a binary lesion mask. Next, we
normalised every mask to MNI152 template coordinates. We then seeded a normative
connectome database to compute a lesion network map for each patient. Finally, we
thresholded the network maps and tallied shared nodes across patients.

Results
Shared nodes converged on a common network.
